# tests/hr/integration/test_integration.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:50Z

## Purpose

Recommended: pytest + real PostgreSQL + real Redis.
Per global §64.30 tier 2: cross-service flows touch real DB + cache.

- from `_` import os

### Functions
- `test_hr_db_roundtrip()`: REPLACE — verify hr table CRUD round-trips against real Postgres.
